facebook.caption: Some restaurants feel like a reset button. Sora & Umi at InterContinental's Bãi Trường resort is one of them. Asian cuisine, long-beach views, and a vibe that makes you forget you had a flight this morning. 4.6 stars across 199 reviews. That's not luck. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
